tasks.title: Confirm the build approach
tasks.expectedOutput: Implementation plan with boundaries, risks, tests, and handoff notes
tasks.resultSummary: Architecture response recorded. Canonical package and approved Blueprint control implementation scope.

tasks.title: Implement the approved package
tasks.requiredInput: Founder-approved Natural Nation Day 1 member-facing foundation under app/frontend. FOUNDER CORRECTION REQUEST: Send the five verified corrections back to Codex before Founder approval.
tasks.expectedOutput: A real GitHub pull request with implementation and validation evidence.
tasks.resultSummary: Implementation created through the protected repository-execution adapter. GitHub pull request: https://github.com/Natural-Nation-MVP/natural-nation-mvp/pull/38. Changed files: app/frontend/index.html, app/frontend/package.json, app/frontend/src/App.js, app/frontend/src/assets/styles.css, app/frontend/src/main.js. Validation evidence is recorded in PR #38 and its CI checks.

retryContext.reason: Send the five verified corrections back to Codex before Founder approval.
retryContext.requiredCorrection: Implement the requested corrections on a successor pull request with fresh validation evidence.

tasks.title: Review the experience
tasks.requiredInput: Review only GitHub PR #38 and these exact changed files: app/frontend/index.html, app/frontend/package.json, app/frontend/src/App.js, app/frontend/src/assets/styles.css, app/frontend/src/main.js. Evaluate the actual corrected Natural Nation Day 1 implementation. Do not review PR #30, do not invent files, and do not include full file contents. Return only the provider-native experience_review contract.
tasks.expectedOutput: A provider-native experience_review JSON object with exact camelCase fields: type, summary, passes, issues, mergeBlockers, recommendation, and evidence. Evidence paths must be selected from the five exact PR #38 paths.

retryContext.reason: Gemini was not given a provider-native schema for AI-TASK-003 and the task still referenced obsolete PR #30 evidence. It returned fenced JSON with snake_case fields and stale file assumptions.
retryContext.requiredCorrection: Enforce the experience_review schema at the provider API, normalize the structured result before verification, and validate against current PR #38 evidence paths.

tasks.title: Prepare the Founder review
tasks.requiredInput: Use the verified PR #38 implementation evidence and the next verified Gemini review. Return only the provider-native founder_review contract.
tasks.expectedOutput: A provider-native founder_review JSON object with exact fields: type, decision, comments, risks, and nextAction.

tasks.title: Approve or request changes
tasks.requiredInput: Verified build pull request, validation evidence, deterministic experience review, and deterministic Founder summary

finalDecision.note: Send the five verified corrections back to Codex before Founder approval.
